title: Began Competitive Programming Journey
subtitle: Discovering Algorithms & Data Structures
description: Fell in love with computational problem solving. Started practicing on LeetCode and CodeChef, learning advanced dynamic programming, graph theory algorithms, and mathematical optimization techniques.

title: Deep Dive into Machine Learning
subtitle: From Linear Algebra to PyTorch
description: Transitioned from traditional algorithmics to statistical learning. Built computer vision pipelines using PyTorch, custom convolutional neural networks, and integrated Hugging Face models for natural language interfaces.

title: Venturing into Robotics & Control
subtitle: Bridging Software and the Physical World
description: Joined college robotics lab and learned ROS 2 (Robot Operating System) and inverse kinematics. Worked on hardware-in-the-loop systems, combining sensor streams (LiDAR, IMU) for mapping and navigation.

title: Optimizing AI for the Edge
subtitle: TensorRT & Quantization Workflows
description: Focused on deploying heavy models onto hardware-constrained environments. Explored TensorRT optimization and INT8 quantization, deploying real-time depth estimation models onto Jetson devices.

title: The Hackathon Sprint
subtitle: 48-Hour Rapid Prototyping & Leadership
description: Participated in and won multiple national hackathons. Led team development for full-stack AI and IoT systems, refining skills in rapid API integrations, robust database architecture, and project presentations.
